name: emailsherlock/email-guard-core
description: Email-Guard core library for PHP: local email checks (syntax, reserved TLDs, disposable domains) plus optional escalation to the EmailSherlock Verify API.

suggest.ext-curl: Used by the default transport for the Verify API call
suggest.psr/http-client: To plug in your own PSR-18 HTTP client via Psr18Transport
